question: Is dietary cholesterol the main cause of high blood cholesterol?
topic: Corrects persistent misconception about dietary vs. serum cholesterol relationship that affects food

sources.name: Dietary Reference Intakes for Energy, Carbohydrate, Fiber, Fat, Fatty Acids, Cholesterol, Protein, and Amino Acids

discovery_sources.text: Babies are born with essentially zero LDL cholesterol—needs verification of baseline pediatric cholesterol values
discovery_sources.origin: Unbiased Science: Spring Break Rerun: Cholester-all In! The Role of Cholesterol in Heart Health

discovery_sources.text: Dietary cholesterol intake has minimal effect on serum cholesterol for most people due to genetic mediation—widely supported
